activities_projects.title: Detailed River System Mapping
steps: Mark the Indus, Ganga and Brahmaputra river systems
Add at least five tributaries for each system
Use different colors for each river system
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students analyze spatial distribution of major river systems
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and completeness of mapping (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Drainage Pattern Investigation
steps: Study different drainage patterns such as dendritic and trellis
Find examples of these patterns in India
Explain why they occur
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand factors influencing drainage patterns

activities_projects.title: Delta Formation Study
steps: Study the formation of the Sundarban delta
Explain the role of Ganga and Brahmaputra
Draw a simple diagram of delta formation
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand sediment deposition and delta formation

activities_projects.title: Comparative Study of Two River Basins
steps: Select one Himalayan river and one Peninsular river
Compare their length, flow pattern and basin area
Write a short analytical report

activities_projects.title: Case Study on River Flooding
steps: Choose a flood-prone river
Describe the causes of flooding
Explain its impact on people and agriculture
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand environmental challenges related to rivers

activities_projects.title: River Valley Projects Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of river valley projects
steps: Select one river valley project in India
Describe its objectives and benefits
Mention the river on which it is built
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand hydropower and irrigation projects

activities_projects.title: Lake Formation Investigation
steps: Identify lakes formed by glaciers, tectonic activity and lagoons
List examples from India
Explain how each type forms
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand geological processes forming lakes

activities_projects.title: River Course Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Study upper, middle and lower river courses
steps: Choose a river from India
Describe its upper, middle and lower courses
Identify features present in each stage

activities_projects.title: River Pollution Case Study
activities_projects.objective: Analyze pollution problems in Indian rivers
steps: Choose a polluted river in India
Explain the causes of pollution
Discuss government actions to control pollution
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand environmental management of rivers

activities_projects.title: Debate on River Conservation
activities_projects.objective: Encourage critical thinking about water conservation
steps: Prepare arguments for river conservation
Discuss human activities affecting rivers
Suggest sustainable solutions
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop awareness about sustainable water management
